title: Bluey Play Pack Coloring Book | Coloring Pad, Mini Coloring Pad, 4 Coloring Pencils | Kids Activity Coloring Book | Great for Travel | Gifts for Kids | Ages 3+
features: ALL-IN-ONE SET: Dive into the vibrant world of Bluey with the Bluey Play Pack, featuring bluey colouring activities: a mini colouring pad, and 4 colouring pencils.
BLUEY ADVENTURES AWAIT: This pack encapsulates the fun and charm of Bluey, making it a must-have for fans of bluey books and the beloved animated series.
DOUBLE DOSE OF FUN: With both a standard and mini colouring pad included, kids have an array of Bluey-themed pages to explore and colour.
PREMIUM COLOURING EXPERIENCE: Equipped with 4 top-notch colouring pencils, children can bring the world of Bluey to life with vivid and captivating colours.
description: Product Description IDEAL GIFT CHOICE: Crafted by Alligator Products Ltd., this Bluey Play Pack is a fantastic gift for birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion, ensuring endless hours of colourful entertainment for young artists! Safety Warning Warning! Small Parts, Choking Hazard.
